item.title: Yoshihiro Hattori – Part 1
item.description: In 1992, Japanese exchange student Yoshihiro Hattori knocked on the wrong door while heading to a Halloween party in Louisiana. What tragic chain of events turned a simple mistake into an international debate on gun laws?

media:content.media:title: Yoshihiro Hattori – Part 1
media:content.media:description: In 1992, Japanese exchange student Yoshihiro Hattori knocked on the wrong door while heading to a Halloween party in Louisiana. What tragic chain of events turned a simple mistake into an international debate on gun laws?

item.title: Betrayed by the One She Trusted Most
item.description: The case of Maria Fernanda López reveals how betrayal by someone close can lead to devastating consequences. How did trust become her downfall?

media:content.media:title: Betrayed by the One She Trusted Most
media:content.media:description: The case of Maria Fernanda López reveals how betrayal by someone close can lead to devastating consequences. How did trust become her downfall?

item.title: A Chilling Warning Before She Disappeared
item.description: The Ana María Serrano case reveals how a chilling warning preceded her disappearance. What did she say before vanishing, and how did it shape the investigation?

media:content.media:title: A Chilling Warning Before She Disappeared
media:content.media:description: The Ana María Serrano case reveals how a chilling warning preceded her disappearance. What did she say before vanishing, and how did it shape the investigation?

item.title: The Disappearance of Monica Carrasco
item.description: Explore the mystery surrounding Monica Carrasco, whose story continues to raise questions. What clues remain in this unresolved case?

media:content.media:title: The Disappearance of Monica Carrasco
media:content.media:description: Explore the mystery surrounding Monica Carrasco, whose story continues to raise questions. What clues remain in this unresolved case?

item.title: What happened to Laura Ayala?
item.description: On Sunday March 10th, 2002, Laura left her apartment in Houston TX to walk to a convenience store to purchase a newspaper. This store was behind Laura's house... literally a 30 second walk. Laura arrived to this store at around 10:15 pm, purchased the newspaper and somewhere along the route back to her house... Laura disappeared. So what happened to Laura Ayala?

media:content.media:title: What happened to Laura Ayala?
media:content.media:description: On Sunday March 10th, 2002, Laura left her apartment in Houston TX to walk to a convenience store to purchase a newspaper. This store was behind Laura's house... literally a 30 second walk. Laura arrived to this store at around 10:15 pm, purchased the newspaper and somewhere along the route back to her house... Laura disappeared. So what happened to Laura Ayala?

item.title: Betty Gore & Candy Montgomery
item.description: Discover what happened to Betty Gore and how her friend Candy Montgomery turned trust into tragedy. How did this shocking case unfold?

media:content.media:title: Betty Gore & Candy Montgomery
media:content.media:description: Discover what happened to Betty Gore and how her friend Candy Montgomery turned trust into tragedy. How did this shocking case unfold?

item.title: McDonald’s Hoax Calls: Louise Ogborn’s Stor
item.description: Discover the shocking case of 18‑year‑old Louise Ogborn, a victim of the McDonald’s hoax phone calls scam. A caller posing as police manipulated staff into humiliating actions, leading to lawsuits and national outrage. How could such a scheme go so far?

media:content.media:title: McDonald’s Hoax Calls: Louise Ogborn’s Stor
media:content.media:description: Discover the shocking case of 18‑year‑old Louise Ogborn, a victim of the McDonald’s hoax phone calls scam. A caller posing as police manipulated staff into humiliating actions, leading to lawsuits and national outrage. How could such a scheme go so far?
